Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Compel Further Production Of Documents Form Stellar Corte Amdera, Llc
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
JUSTINE DURRELL, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: FRANCESCA BALL
MICHAEL BURKE, ESQ. for defendant and opposing party: STELLAR CORTE MADERA LLC.

After hearing, THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS FRANCESCA BALL and KEARNEY BUSKIRK's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Defendant Stellar Corte Madera, LLC is granted in part and denied in part. As to Nos. 12, 13, 16, and 18, the responses are properly limited to building 6. Documents related to any other buildings are irrelevant. The objections to Nos. 12, 13, 16, and 18 are overruled and ordered stricken, except as to privilege. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity. The responses shall be limited in subject matter as agreed in meet and confer. The responses, without objections, otherwise may be adequate. Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's objections to the declaration of Justine Durrell at page 12 , paragraph 8, 16-19, and page 12 , paragraph 9, 1-2 are sustained as hearsay. Defendant's objections to the declaration of Justine Durrell as to exhibits 6 and 8 are overruled as they are not hearsay as they are not admitted for the truth of the matters set forth in the exhibits. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
